ocr.text: The table presents a comprehensive analysis of the evolutionary dynamics between two orthologous genes, LpPPH and BdPPH,
through key metrics including the nonsynonymous substitution rate (Ka), synonymous substitution rate (Ks), and the ratio of Ka
to Ks (Ka/Ks). These metrics are critical for understanding the evolutionary selection pressures acting on these genes,
particularly in the context of their association with pro-social behavior as measured by the pro-social total score. Notably, the
data indicate that the average pro-social total score for non-orphans is 8.8 (SD = 1.9), while orphans display a slightly lower
average score of 7.8 (SD = 2.2), suggesting potential distinctions in behavior linked to genetic factors. The inclusion of a P
value from a two-tailed t-test further elucidates the statistical significance of these differences.
Ortholog 1  Ortholog 2  Ks  Ka  Ka/Ks  Evolutionary selection
LpPPH  BdPPH  0.3179  0.0836  0.263  Purifying
BdPPH  OsPPH  0. 6018  0.1059  0.176  Purifying
OsPPH  ZmPPH  0.8235  0.1099  0.133  Purifying
ZmPPH  SbPPH  0.2066  0.0388  0.188  Purifying
AtPPH  MtPPH  1.6381  0.2537  0.155  Purifying
Orphans n = 30 Mean, (SD)  Non-orphans n = 30 Mean, (SD)  P value t-test (2-tailed)
Pro-social total score  8.8 (1.9)  7.8 (2.2)  0.35 ns
Conduct problems total score  2.4 (1.9)  2.8 (2.2)  0.55 ns
Peer problems total score  3.5 (2.6)  4.2 (2.1)  0.28 ns
Hyperactivity total score  2.6 (2.0)  3.2 (1.4)  0.16 ns
Emotional problems total score  4.2 (2.7)  3.5 (2.4)  0.35 ns
Day of treatment and dosage timeline
Treatment  Day −4  Day −1  Day 0
A  0.4 μg/g GnRHa
B  0.4 μg/g GnRHa + 10 μg/g MET
C  0.4 μg/g GnRHa + 13.5 IU/g hCG
D  3.7 IU/g hCG  3.7 IU/g hCG  0.4 μg/g GnRHa + 13.5 IU/g hCG
This analysis provides valuable insights into the evolutionary trajectories of these orthologs and their implications for
understanding genetic influences on social behaviors. The findings underscore the importance of examining both orphans and
non-orphans in the context of evolutionary selection.
